project.name: MileStream
project.description: MileStream is a hybrid contractor-credential asset formed through HACD Stack, pairing PoW-backed on-chain identity with milestone payment streaming for freelancers and clients.

asset.utility_summary: Each MSTR unit represents one share of a contractor credential formed through a HACD Stack lot. The unique HACD name acts as a permanent Contractor ID. Holders can verify formation on the Hacash explorer. Contractor directory listing and GrowStreams milestone payment templates are product features under development for the incubator sprint.

copy.headline: Freelancer trust, formed through HACD.
copy.subheadline: MileStream issues MSTR — a hybrid credential where each HACD becomes a permanent Contractor ID, paired with milestone payment streaming for small gigs.
copy.short_description: MSTR is formed across 200 HACD lots at 50 HAC each. Each lot forms 5,000 MSTR and one unique Contractor ID. Total supply is 1,000,000 MSTR. Formation cost filters fake profiles. Milestone payments use GrowStreams.
copy.risk_disclosure: MSTR is a utility Stack Asset for contractor credentials, not an investment product. No price, liquidity, listing, or return is guaranteed. Payment streaming features depend on product development and GrowStreams infrastructure. Formation cost is non-refundable. MileStream does not provide legal escrow or dispute arbitration. This is a draft structure pending HACD Labs review.

notes: HACD Labs Incubator Cohort 2 / GrowStreams quest: https://www.growstreams.xyz/app/projects/HACD
Hybrid FT+NFT: MSTR is fungible credential weight; HACD name is unique Contractor ID.
GrowStreams integration is product-layer; not enforced by the Stack protocol.
First phase (20 lots) reserved for pilot contractors during sprint week.
Maximum 5 HACD per participant must be enforced at Launchpad level.
Contractor directory and GrowStreams pilot flows are not yet live; sprint deliverables.
